blended.narrative: Anthony Lakes is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.5 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 6,183 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.2" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 11".
